categories.name: Residential Plumbing
categories.description: Complete plumbing services for Houston homes.

categories.name: Drain & Sewer
categories.description: Professional drain cleaning and sewer repair.

services.name: Drain Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Professional drain cleaning to restore flow and prevent backups in your Houston home.
services.longDescription: Slow drains and recurring clogs are more than an inconvenience. Our drain cleaning service uses professional-grade equipment to clear blockages in kitchen sinks, bathroom drains, and floor drains. We identify the root cause so the problem doesn't come back next week.
services.metaTitle: Drain Cleaning Houston TX | Hart Of Texas Plumbing
services.metaDescription: Professional drain cleaning in Houston. Fast service, honest pricing. Call (713) 364-3254 for same-day appointments.

services.name: Sewer Line Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert sewer line diagnosis and repair for Houston properties.
services.longDescription: Sewer line problems can cause serious damage if left unchecked. We use camera inspection to pinpoint the issue, then recommend the most cost-effective repair. From spot repairs to full line replacement, we handle it with minimal disruption to your yard.
services.metaTitle: Sewer Line Repair Houston | Hart Of Texas Plumbing
services.metaDescription: Sewer line repair and replacement in Houston TX. Camera inspection, trenchless options. Call (713) 364-3254.

services.name: Leak Detection & Repair
services.shortDescription: Find and fix hidden leaks before they cause costly water damage.
services.longDescription: A small leak can waste thousands of gallons and cause mold, rot, and structural damage. Our leak detection service locates hidden leaks in walls, under slabs, and in supply lines using specialized equipment. Once found, we repair it properly the first time.
services.metaTitle: Leak Detection Houston TX | Hart Of Texas Plumbing
services.metaDescription: Expert leak detection and repair in Houston. Electronic detection, slab leaks, pipe repair. Call (713) 364-3254.

services.name: Water Heater Service
services.shortDescription: Water heater installation, repair, and replacement for Houston homes.
services.longDescription: No hot water is a problem that needs fixing fast. We service all major brands of tank and tankless water heaters. Whether you need a repair, a new installation, or advice on upgrading to a more efficient unit, we'll give you honest recommendations.
services.metaTitle: Water Heater Service Houston | Hart Of Texas Plumbing
services.metaDescription: Water heater repair and installation in Houston TX. Tank and tankless. Call (713) 364-3254 for same-day service.

services.name: Toilet Repair & Installation
services.shortDescription: Running toilets, clogs, and new installations handled professionally.
services.longDescription: A running toilet wastes water and money. A clogged toilet is an emergency. We fix both quickly. Our plumbers handle everything from simple flapper replacements to full toilet installations, always with upfront pricing and clean workmanship.
services.metaTitle: Toilet Repair Houston TX | Hart Of Texas Plumbing
services.metaDescription: Toilet repair and installation in Houston. Fast, clean service. Call (713) 364-3254.

services.name: Faucet & Fixture Repair
services.shortDescription: Leaky faucets, broken fixtures, and new installations throughout your home.
services.longDescription: Dripping faucets and worn-out fixtures waste water and look bad. We repair and replace kitchen faucets, bathroom fixtures, showerheads, and outdoor spigots. Bring your own fixture or choose from our trusted brands.
services.metaTitle: Faucet Repair Houston TX | Hart Of Texas Plumbing
services.metaDescription: Faucet and fixture repair in Houston. Kitchen, bathroom, outdoor. Call (713) 364-3254.

services.name: Whole-Home Repiping
services.shortDescription: Upgrade old, corroded pipes to modern materials for better water flow and quality.
services.longDescription: Homes with galvanized or polybutylene pipes eventually need repiping. Discolored water, low pressure, and frequent leaks are signs it's time. We replace old pipes with modern PEX or copper, improving water quality, pressure, and peace of mind.
services.metaTitle: Repiping Houston TX | Hart Of Texas Plumbing
services.metaDescription: Whole-home repiping in Houston. Replace old galvanized pipes with PEX or copper. Call (713) 364-3254.
